code:
---
title: Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
---

stateDiagram-v2
    %% Visit Operational Status
    state "VisitOperationalStatus" as VisitOperational {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> Planned : Reservation Confirmed
        Planned --> PendingEntry : Vehicle Nearing Lot (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)
        PendingEntry --> EnteredLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Entry Gate / Gate Opened
        PendingEntry --> Cancelled : Reservation NoShow / Expired before entry
        
        EnteredLot --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle Passed Entry Gate, Awaiting Slot Assignment or In Free-Roam
        ActiveInLot --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
        ActiveInLot --> AwaitingSlotAssignment : Vehicle in lot, but no slot yet (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> SlotAssigned : Slot Assigned for Valet Park
        
        SlotAssigned --> ActiveInLot : Vehicle leaves slot, becomes Free-Roam (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
        SlotAssigned --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened
        ActiveInLot --> ExitedLot : Vehicle ANPR Confirmed at Exit Gate / Gate Opened (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)

        ExitedLot --> CompletedOperational : Post-exit processing complete (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
        
        %% Error / Exception States for Operational
        Planned --> FailedToEnter : Technical issue at gate, reservation remains
        PendingEntry --> FailedToEnter
        EnteredLot --> Interrupted : e.g., System outage, vehicle stuck in lot
        ActiveInLot --> Interrupted
        SlotAssigned --> Interrupted
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> Interrupted
        Interrupted --> ExitedLot : Manual Override Exit
        Interrupted --> Abandoned : Vehicle left in lot after prolonged interruption
        Interrupted --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated, forced evacuation
        
        %% Emergency evacuation can happen from any active state
        EnteredLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        ActiveInLot --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated  
        SlotAssigned --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        AwaitingSlotAssignment --> EmergencyEvacuated : Emergency Mode activated
        
        Abandoned --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
        CompletedOperational --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        Cancelled --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
        FailedToEnter --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
        EmergencyEvacuated --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]
    }

    %% Visit Billing Status (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    state "VisitBillingStatus" as VisitBilling {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> PendingPriceQuote : Visit Started (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
        PendingPriceQuote --> PriceQuoteReceived : Pricing Service responds
        PriceQuoteReceived --> PendingPayment : Price confirmed, awaiting customer payment
        PendingPayment --> PaymentInProgress : Customer initiates payment
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentConfirmed : Payment successful (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
        PaymentInProgress --> PaymentFailed : Payment attempt failed
        PaymentFailed --> PendingPayment : Retry Payment
        PaymentFailed --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Multiple failures or issue
        
        PaymentConfirmed --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Billing cycle complete for this visit
        
        %% Alternative Billing Flows
        PendingPriceQuote --> GraceExempt_NoCharge : Visit qualifies for no charge (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
        GraceExempt_NoCharge --> BillingFinalized_Paid : (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

        PriceQuoteReceived --> RequiresManualBillingIntervention : Price calculation error or dispute
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Paid : Manual resolution leads to payment
        RequiresManualBillingIntervention --> BillingFinalized_Unpaid : Manual resolution leads to write-off or deferral
        
        BillingFinalized_Paid --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]
        BillingFinalized_Unpaid --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }
    
    note right of VisitOperational
      VisitOperationalStatus:
      - Planned
      - PendingEntry
      - EnteredLot
      - ActiveInLot
      - AwaitingSlotAssignment
      - SlotAssigned
      - ExitedLot
      - Interrupted
      - Abandoned
      - EmergencyEvacuated
      - CompletedOperational (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
      - Cancelled (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
      - FailedToEnter 
    end note

    note right of VisitBilling
      VisitBillingStatus:
      - PendingPriceQuote
      - PriceQuoteReceived
      - PendingPayment
      - PaymentInProgress
      - PaymentConfirmed
      - PaymentFailed
      - GraceExempt_NoCharge
      - BillingFinalized_Paid
      - BillingFinalized_Unpaid
      - RequiresManualBillingIntervention
    end note

    %% Linking Operational and Billing states (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
    %% This is hard to show perfectly in Mermaid for parallel states that are not time-synchronized
    %% but conceptually:
    %% ExitedLot (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) often triggers final billing actions if not already paid.
    %% PaymentConfirmed (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) can influence ExitedLot (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) if exit is gated by payment.
    %% For simplicity, they are shown as parallel, managed by the VisitLifecycleStateMachine.
    
    %% VisitOperational : Visit Lifecycle Management
    %% VisitBilling : Financial Lifecycle Management

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们今天要把Easy Park Plus的停车访问生命周期完整画出来。这个系统涉及IoT工业边缘节点、PLC逻辑控制器，还有MQTT Broker，状态流转比较复杂。
明白。您说的是一个停车场的智能停车系统，车辆从预约到离场，同时伴随计费流程。我们需要画两个并行的状态机吗？
对，一个是VisitOperationalStatus，处理车辆在停车场的物理状态；另一个是VisitBillingStatus，处理计费生命周期。两者通过IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker松耦合。
好的，我先创建VisitOperationalStatus作为复合状态，内部从Planned开始。Planned是预约已确认的状态对吗？
是的，Planned是起点。当IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode检测到车辆接近停车场时，状态变为PendingEntry。
Planned到PendingEntry的转移我标记为"Vehicle Nearing Lot (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)"。那PendingEntry之后呢？
PendingEntry有两个出口：正常情况是ANPR摄像头识别车牌后开闸，进入EnteredLot；异常情况是预约过期未入场，变成Cancelled。
已添加。EnteredLot之后车辆在场内，应该到ActiveInLot状态？这里要区分自由漫游和已分配车位两种情况吧？
没错。ActiveInLot是一个聚合状态，车辆可能在等待分配车位，也可能已经在某个车位。所以从ActiveInLot要分出两条路径：到AwaitingSlotAssignment或者到SlotAssigned。
AwaitingSlotAssignment是车辆在场内但还没分配车位，这个状态由IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker触发对吗？
对，MQTT Broker上报车辆位置但PLC还没完成车位分配。等IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic完成计算，就从AwaitingSlotAssignment转到SlotAssigned。
好的，这里有个细节：SlotAssigned之后，如果车辆离开车位变成自由漫游，要回到ActiveInLot吗？
是的，这个转移由IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController触发，车位地锁释放后车辆可以重新进入自由漫游状态。
离场流程我理一下：SlotAssigned可以直接到ExitedLot，ActiveInLot也可以直接到ExitedLot，都是ANPR确认后开闸？
正确。但注意ActiveInLot到ExitedLot是由IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode触发，而SlotAssigned到ExitedLot是标准离场流程。ExitedLot之后是CompletedOperational，由MQTT Broker确认后续处理完成。
操作状态的主流程差不多了。现在需要处理异常状态吗？比如系统故障或者车辆被困？
需要。Planned和PendingEntry都可能遇到FailedToEnter，比如道闸故障但预约仍然有效。另外EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都可能进入Interrupted状态。
Interrupted之后有哪些可能？我看到有Abandoned和EmergencyEvacuated两种严重情况。
Interrupted可以人工干预后从ExitedLot离场，或者长时间未处理变成Abandoned，还有紧急情况下触发EmergencyEvacuated。另外EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、SlotAssigned、AwaitingSlotAssignment都能直接触发EmergencyEvacuated。
异常状态都加上了。现在处理终止状态：Abandoned指向IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，CompletedOperational指向IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController，Cancelled和FailedToEnter、EmergencyEvacuated也各自指向不同组件？
等等，FailedToEnter应该指向IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker，不是ActuatorController。这个状态需要Broker来协调重新预约或退款流程。
已修正，FailedToEnter现在指向IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。VisitOperational部分完成了，现在开始VisitBillingStatus？
对，计费状态机从PendingPriceQuote开始，由IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic触发，表示访问已开始需要计费。
VisitBilling创建完成，PendingPriceQuote作为起点。接下来是PriceQuoteReceived？
是的，定价服务响应后进入PriceQuoteReceived，然后到PendingPayment等待客户确认价格并支付。
支付流程我这样设计：PendingPayment到PaymentInProgress是客户发起支付，然后分支到PaymentConfirmed成功，或者PaymentFailed失败。PaymentFailed可以重试回到PendingPayment。
对，但PaymentFailed多次失败后需要人工介入，转到RequiresManualBillingIntervention。PaymentConfirmed之后是BillingFinalized_Paid。
RequiresManualBillingIntervention之后有两个出口：BillingFinalized_Paid是人工解决后完成支付，BillingFinalized_Unpaid是核销或延期？
没错。另外还有个特殊情况：PendingPriceQuote可以直接到GraceExempt_NoCharge，比如15分钟内免费离场，然后由IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream确认后转到BillingFinalized_Paid。
替代计费流程已添加。PriceQuoteReceived也能直接到RequiresManualBillingIntervention，比如价格计算错误的情况。现在处理终止状态：BillingFinalized_Paid指向IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode，BillingFinalized_Unpaid指向IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic？
是的，Paid完成后通知边缘节点更新车辆白名单，Unpaid则通知PLC逻辑限制该车辆的后续预约。
两个状态机都画完了。但它们是并行的，我需要标注一下它们的关系吗？比如ExitedLot会触发最终计费？
对，ExitedLot通常触发最终计费动作，如果还没支付的话。另外PaymentConfirmed可能影响ExitedLot，如果出口道闸需要支付完成才开启。但这些是跨状态机的消息，用注释说明比较好，直接画线会让图太乱。
明白了，我添加注释说明这两个并行状态机由VisitLifecycleStateMachine管理，通过MQTT Broker松耦合。现在需要添加右侧的注释框来列出所有状态吗？

需要，这样读者能快速查看所有状态。VisitOperational的注释要包括Planned、PendingEntry、EnteredLot、ActiveInLot、AwaitingSlotAssignment、SlotAssigned、ExitedLot、Interrupted、Abandoned、EmergencyEvacuated、CompletedOperational、Cancelled、FailedToEnter。注意CompletedOperational要标注IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker，Cancelled标注IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。

VisitOperational的注释已添加。VisitBilling的注释包括PendingPriceQuote、PriceQuoteReceived、PendingPayment、PaymentInProgress、PaymentConfirmed、PaymentFailed、GraceExempt_NoCharge、BillingFinalized_Paid、BillingFinalized_Unpaid、RequiresManualBillingIntervention。
图基本完整了。但我注意到VisitOperational和VisitBilling的命名，我们需要在状态机标签里体现它们的管理职责：一个是Visit Lifecycle Management，一个是Financial Lifecycle Management。
已添加描述性标签。整体结构检查一遍：标题是Easy Park Plus - Visit State Diagram (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)，两个并行复合状态，完整的正常流程和异常处理，右侧注释框列出所有状态。
有个细节要修正：ActiveInLot到SlotAssigned的转移，我之前说的是由PLC触发，但图上还没标注。应该是"Slot Assigned (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)"。
已修正，ActiveInLot到SlotAssigned的转移现在标注了IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic。还有需要调整的吗？
再看一下GraceExempt_NoCharge到BillingFinalized_Paid的转移，确认是由IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream触发？这是 telemetry 数据确认车辆已离场？
是的，telemetry流确认车辆在免费时段内完成离场，无需支付，直接结束计费周期。这个标注正确。
最后确认一下所有IoT组件的分布：EdgeNode负责车辆检测和ANPR，PLC_Logic负责车位分配和道闸控制，ActuatorController负责地锁和支付确认后的开闸，MQTT_Broker负责状态同步和计费协调，TelemetryStream负责数据上报。这个分配在图上都体现了吗？

都体现了。EdgeNode在Planned-PendingEntry、ActiveInLot-ExitedLot、Abandoned终止状态；PLC_Logic在Slot分配、计费开始、BillingFinalized_Unpaid；ActuatorController在SlotAssigned-ActiveInLot、支付确认、多个终止状态；MQTT_Broker在AwaitingSlotAssignment、CompletedOperational、FailedToEnter、整体计费状态机；TelemetryStream在免费离场流程。
完美，这个状态图完整覆盖了Easy Park Plus的IoT工业级停车系统。可以定稿了。
